---
title: News
resources: "news/images/*"
listing:
    - id: news-archive
      contents:
        - news/news.yml
      type: custom
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      template: news-archive.ejs
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---


<div class="news-filters" aria-label="Filter news by category">
  <button type="button" class="news-filter is-active" data-news-filter="all">All</button>
  <button type="button" class="news-filter" data-news-filter="Award">Award</button>
  <button type="button" class="news-filter" data-news-filter="Grant">Grant</button>
  <button type="button" class="news-filter" data-news-filter="Publication">Publication</button>
  <button type="button" class="news-filter" data-news-filter="Talks">Talks</button>
  <button type="button" class="news-filter" data-news-filter="Service">Service</button>
</div>

::: {#news-archive}
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const filterButtons = document.querySelectorAll("[data-news-filter]");
  const filterControls = document.querySelectorAll(".news-filter");
  const newsItems = document.querySelectorAll("#listing-news-archive .news-archive-item");
  const linkedFilters = {
    Award: ["Award", "Recognition"],
    Recognition: ["Award", "Recognition"]
  };

  function applyNewsFilter(category) {
    const activeCategories = linkedFilters[category] || [category];

    filterControls.forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle("is-active", button.dataset.newsFilter === category);
    });

    newsItems.forEach((item) => {
      const itemCategories = Array.from(item.querySelectorAll(".news-tag")).map((tag) => tag.dataset.newsFilter);
      item.hidden = category !== "all" && !itemCategories.some((itemCategory) => activeCategories.includes(itemCategory));
    });
  }

  filterButtons.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener("click", function () {
      applyNewsFilter(button.dataset.newsFilter);
    });
  });
});
</script>
